title: Mister Rui Bent Heavy Duty Scraper, 3" Bent Scraper with Pole Socket Hammer End, Stainless Steel Bent Blade with Anti Slip Rubber Handle, Heavy Duty Paint Remover Scraper Tool
features: Stainless Steel Materials: The 3" heavy duty bent pole scraper is manufactured from the highest quality materials and undergo stringent quality control measures

Stainless Blade: 420 sharp stainless steel blade is hardened, precision ground and mirror polished. Curved blade protects hands and allows for close wall scraping. Stainless blade will not rust, ensuring optimal service and continuing great performance for a long time

Sharpened Chisel Blade: The chisel blade of the heavy duty bent pole scraper is finely sharpened for excellent scraping results. It makes it easy to complete removing tasks such as removing efficiently and effectively paint, wallpaper

Comfortable Handle: Ergonomically designed rubber handle is a comfortable grip for long hours work. Its end of the handle has a built in hammer for hammering nails. The bent pole scraper end can be twisted open and can be used with an extended rod to operate in hard to reach places

Unexpected Effect: Our 3" heavy duty bent pole scrapes can be used for most surface preparation and paint removal jobs. Ideal tools for chipping and scraping,making the surface of the wall more flat and smooth
description: Our 3" heavy duty bent pole scrapes are used for removing siding, debris, paint, wallpaper, etc. The stainless steel blade of the heavy duty bent pole scraper is made of premium stainless steel for corrosion resistance, tempered for strength, both sharp and flexible. Mirror polished blade has a special advantage on cleaning and maintenance. You can open the base and put in an extension pole to shovel off the high peeling siding or paint. The end of the scrape could hammer nails. The 3" heavy duty bent pole scraper is a multipurpose tool
